creator: benji791@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

I have just installed your port using : “pkg install owncloudclient” in a fresh freenas jail. The installation has been successful but has this machine is headless, I intend only to use the command line and I directly get a seg fault. I cannot find anything related to this issue. Can you confirm that command line is supported? And that I use it correctly? See bellow.

root@mirall:/usr/home/miralluser # owncloudcmd --user ******* --password ******* --trust /mnt/test_owncloud https://webcloud.zaclys.com

Segmentation fault

Thanks in advance for your support.

Regards,

Benjamin
